stemHtml: During a radar approach, you are following an ATC instruction and have started a right turn from 210 degrees onto North. What instruction would you expect the controller to give you, if the controller now wants you to head 335 degrees instead?

options.a: G-ACZG, MODIFY HEADING THREE THREE FIVE DEGREES.
options.b: G-ACZG, LEAVE THREE SIX ZERO DEGREES HEADING THREE THREE FIVE DEGREES.
options.c: G-ACZG, FOLLOW HEADING THREE THREE FIVE DEGREES.
options.d: G-ACZG, STOP TURN HEADING THREE THREE FIVE DEGREES.
